title: Brown Eyed Girl
why_this_song: Brown Eyed Girl by Van Morrison (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "My brown-eyed girl"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "My brown-eyed girl"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "My brown-eyed girl"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Laughing and a running hey, hey"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Hiding behind a rainbow's wall"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "brown" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "brown" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "eyed" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: All along the waterfall, with you

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Brown Eyed Girl" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Brown Eyed Girl" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Brown Eyed Girl" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Brown Eyed Girl"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Van Morrison one question about "Brown Eyed Girl", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Van Morrison sobre "Brown Eyed Girl", o que seria e por quê?
